mapper.sql: s.samy2_id, s.cd_grp, s.cd_vl, s.cd_nm, s.srtord_vl, s.attr_nm1, s.attr_nm2, s.attr_nm3, s.attr_nm4, s.expln_cn, s.cd_infw_se_cd, s.use_yn, s.rgtr, s.reg_dt, s.mdfr, s.mdfcn_dt, s.group_cd, s.col01, s.col02, s.col03, s.col04, s.col05, s.col06, s.col07, s.col08, s.col09, s.status_cd, s.type_cd, s.div_cd, s.kind_cd, s.cate_cds, s.samy1_id

where.if: AND (s.samy2_id ILIKE '%'||#{searchValue}||'%' OR s.cd_nm ILIKE '%'||#{searchValue}||'%' OR s.cd_grp ILIKE '%'||#{searchValue}||'%')

mapper.select:
SELECT /* base.zz :: ZzSamy2 :: selectList */ FROM shopjoy_2604.zz_samy2 s
ORDER BY s.reg_dt DESC, s.samy2_id ASC

SELECT /* base.zz :: ZzSamy2 :: selectPageList */ FROM shopjoy_2604.zz_samy2 s
ORDER BY s.reg_dt DESC, s.samy2_id ASC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(s.*) /* base.zz :: ZzSamy2 :: selectPageCount */ FROM shopjoy_2604.zz_samy2 s
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO shopjoy_2604.zz_samy2 /* base.zz :: ZzSamy2 :: insert */ (samy2_id, cd_grp, cd_vl, cd_nm, srtord_vl, attr_nm1, attr_nm2, attr_nm3, attr_nm4, expln_cn, cd_infw_se_cd, use_yn, rgtr, reg_dt, mdfr, mdfcn_dt, group_cd, col01, col02, col03, col04, col05, col06, col07, col08, col09, status_cd, type_cd, div_cd, kind_cd, cate_cds, samy1_id) VALUES (#{samy2Id}, #{cdGrp}, #{cdVl}, #{cdNm}, #{srtordVl}, #{attrNm1}, #{attrNm2}, #{attrNm3}, #{attrNm4}, #{explnCn}, #{cdInfwSeCd}, #{useYn}, #{rgtr}, #{regDt}, #{mdfr}, #{mdfcnDt}, #{groupCd}, #{col01}, #{col02}, #{col03}, #{col04}, #{col05}, #{col06}, #{col07}, #{col08}, #{col09}, #{statusCd}, #{typeCd}, #{divCd}, #{kindCd}, #{cateCds}, #{samy1Id})
mapper.update: UPDATE shopjoy_2604.zz_samy2 /* base.zz :: ZzSamy2 :: update */ SET cd_grp = #{cdGrp}, cd_vl = #{cdVl}, cd_nm = #{cdNm}, srtord_vl = #{srtordVl}, attr_nm1 = #{attrNm1}, attr_nm2 = #{attrNm2}, attr_nm3 = #{attrNm3}, attr_nm4 = #{attrNm4}, expln_cn = #{explnCn}, cd_infw_se_cd = #{cdInfwSeCd}, use_yn = #{useYn}, mdfr = #{mdfr}, mdfcn_dt = #{mdfcnDt}, group_cd = #{groupCd}, col01 = #{col01}, col02 = #{col02}, col03 = #{col03}, col04 = #{col04}, col05 = #{col05}, col06 = #{col06}, col07 = #{col07}, col08 = #{col08}, col09 = #{col09}, status_cd = #{statusCd}, type_cd = #{typeCd}, div_cd = #{divCd}, kind_cd = #{kindCd}, cate_cds = #{cateCds}, samy1_id = #{samy1Id} WHERE samy2_id = #{samy2Id}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM shopjoy_2604.zz_samy2 /* base.zz :: ZzSamy2 :: delete */ WHERE samy2_id = #{samy2Id}
